features: Dual-action cleaning: Reach Duo Medium Toothbrush offers two levels of cleaning power for a brighter smile.
Innovative design: Features a unique combination of bristles for thorough plaque removal and gum stimulation.
Effective plaque control: Helps prevent tartar buildup and promotes healthier gums with every brush.
Comfortable grip: Ergonomically designed handle provides a secure and comfortable grip for effortless brushing.
Medium bristles: Gentle yet effective on teeth and gums, suitable for daily use.
Enhance your oral care routine: Incorporate Reach Duo Medium Toothbrush for a complete and refreshing dental cleaning experience.
Achieve optimal oral health: Maintain a clean and healthy mouth with regular use of this advanced toothbrush.
Keep your smile radiant: Experience the confidence of a brighter, healthier smile with Reach Duo Medium Toothbrush.
description: Product Description Reach Duo Medium Toothbrush: Dual-Action Cleaning for a Brighter Smile Directions 1. Wet the bristles with water. 2. Apply toothpaste. 3. Hold the toothbrush at a 45-degree angle to your teeth. 4. Brush gently in circular motions, covering all surfaces of your teeth. 5. Brush your tongue for fresh breath. 6. Replace the toothbrush every 3-4 months or when the bristles become frayed. Safety Warning Replace every 3-4 months. Do not use for purposes other than oral hygiene. See more
